creator: josh.carroll@psualum.com
text:
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org (FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org) wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/112366'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112366
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       ffmpeg-devel port not compiling img_resample* functions
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed May 02 19:10:05 GMT 2007

It looks like the recent commits to this port have fixed the problem. I was able to
compile ffmpeg-dev again and then handbrake compiles.

Thanks!
Josh
